title: Remove resolved paper trades from Positions panel
objective: Resolved (closed) paper trades are still rendering inside the Positions panel, mixed in with open positions. This was intentional in the original design but is confusing — the user sees closed games listed alongside live open trades. Remove them from the panel entirely. They remain accessible in the Trade Log drawer.

context.root_cause: renderUnifiedPositions() line 803: const unified = [...enriched, ...shadowOnly, ...resolvedPaper]. The resolvedPaper array (closed DB trades) is included in the render list. DASH_010 already removed them from the badge count, but they still render as cards.
context.desired_behavior: Positions panel shows only: (1) open paper trades (enriched), (2) shadow-only advisory recs (shadowOnly). No resolved/closed cards. The empty state when there are no open positions should read 'No open positions'.

deliverables.label: Remove resolvedPaper from unified render list
Update empty state message
deliverables.where: renderUnifiedPositions() — the empty state string just below the unified check
deliverables.change:
Change:
  'No active or recent positions'
To:
  'No open positions'

acceptance_criteria: Positions panel shows 0 cards when there are no open trades and no shadow-only recs
Resolved/closed paper trade cards do NOT appear in the Positions panel
Open paper trade cards still render correctly
Shadow-only advisory cards still render correctly
Badge count still shows enriched.length + shadowOnly.length (unchanged from DASH_010)
Trade Log drawer still shows all trades including closed ones (not affected — separate code path)
verification: Reload dashboard. With current state (1 open LAD trade, 2 closed SEA@LAA trades):
1. Positions panel should show exactly 1 card (the open LAD trade)
2. The 2 SEA@LAA RESOLVED cards should NOT appear in the Positions panel
4. Trade Log drawer should still list all trades
